3093980.name: CLOUDOME: Demo & Prototype Soundtrack
3093980.description:
Complete soundtrack of CLOUDOME: Prototype by John Halpart.

Music of the opening act of the game (featured fully in the demo) is included as a separate disc (Disc 1) due to it already having been released alongside the original proof-of-concept demo of Cloudome and therefore elsewhere on the internet Cloudome Demo Soundtrack and Cloudome Prototype Soundtrack being two separate releases.
